project_name: Citation Locator Metadata Extraction Intervention Benchmark

decision.recommended_next_action: Use the benchmark artifacts to justify locator-preserving chunking with locator-local expansion and optional citation-neighborhood tie-breaking in the parent citation-resolution pipeline.
decision.stop_reason: The branch beat its kill threshold on typed and all-xref natural-document weak-label runs, and the requested same-locator tie-breaker produced a small positive oracle-free gain without new regressions on the typed set.

recommended_next_action: Use the benchmark artifacts to justify locator-preserving chunking with locator-local expansion and optional citation-neighborhood tie-breaking in the parent citation-resolution pipeline.
run_notes_tail: Implemented `citation_neighborhood_tiebreak_intervention` in `scripts/citation_locator_intervention_benchmark.py`. The policy still expands candidates into preserved-text locator-local chunks and still hides structured candidate metadata; it then parses the query author/year and adds a secondary citation-neighborhood cue only when the local chunk already matches the parsed query locator. This guard keeps noisy numeric-only xref cases from being driven by author matches without a typed locator.

- `python3 scripts/citation_locator_intervention_benchmark.py` completed on the default typed-locator set and refreshed `results/locator_intervention_eval.json`, `results/stratified_manual_audit.jsonl`, and `results/intervention_summary.md`.
- No GPU/inference server was needed; the benchmark remains CPU regex/token-overlap scoring.
- Tie-breaker delta vs stripped body: +0.3168 answer, +0.2423 evidence-top1, +0.2077 MRR.

- Tie-breaker delta vs locator-local expansion: +0.0062 answer, +0.0062 evidence-top1, +0.0052 MRR. Direct comparison found 1 corrected top-1 case and 0 new top-1 regressions on the typed-locator set.
- Gold local author cues are sparse: author cue available for 0.2422 of typed gold local chunks and author-year pair available for 0.2050, explaining the small but positive incremental gain.
All-xref robustness run (n=300, includes noisy numeric-only labels):
- Tie-breaker delta vs stripped body: +0.2334 answer, +0.1600 evidence-top1, +0.1257 MRR.
- Default audit rows: 32; strata remain 8 intervention wins, 8 intervention regressions, 8 shared successes, 8 shared failures.
- Assessment counts: 12 plausible locator-local correct, 4 plausible citation-neighborhood tie-break correct, 8 residual multi-locator collisions, and 8 locator-collision/context-mismatch failures.

The branch hypothesis is supported and the branch-specific kill condition is not met. Locator preservation plus text-derived local expansion produced the major gain, and the author/year citation-neighborhood tie-breaker added a small positive oracle-free improvement. The remaining failures appear to require richer full-document citation/reference graph extraction or stronger evidence labels rather than another same-project regex tie-breaker, so this branch can finalize positive without creating another generic successor.
